The '''''Quaestor''''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Praetor-class Star Battlecruiser/Legends|''Praetor''-class battlecruiser]] that served during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="TEGTW" />

==History==
The ''Quaestor'' was destroyed in a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] accident which also devastated the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] world of [[Pammant/Legends|Pammant]]. The world was fractured to the core and radiation from the engines spilled out, devastating the planet.<ref name="ROTS:ICS">''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Incredible Cross-Sections]]''</ref>
